# ==========================================
# 💜 <NAME / FEATURE TITLE>
# ------------------------------------------
# 🎯 PURPOSE:
# <jelasin singkat tapi jelas fungsi file ini>
#
# ✨ BEHAVIOR:
# <ini system ini “berperilaku” gimana>
# contoh:
# - hanya kirim 1x per hari
# - adaptif berdasarkan waktu
# - tidak spam (pakai lock system)
#
# ⚙️ FLOW:
# 1. <step awal>
# 2. <step berikutnya>
# 3. <sampai akhir>
#
# 🧠 LOGIC:
# <jelasin logika penting>
# contoh:
# - if commit → appreciation
# - if no commit → reminder
# - if lock aktif → skip
#
# 🔑 INPUT:
# - <env / parameter>
#
# 📤 OUTPUT:
# - <hasil>
#
# 🔗 DEPENDENCY:
# - <file lain>
#
# ⚠️ EDGE CASE:
# - <kemungkinan error>
#
# 📝 LOG FORMAT:
# (contoh output log biar kebayang)
# ==============================
# 🔍 Checking Activity
# 📊 Push count: 1
# 💜 Status: Active
# 🎯 Mode: persistent
# 🎲 Tone: clingy
# 📤 Sending message...
# ==============================
#
# 💭 NOTES:
# <insight kecil / filosofi system kamu>
# ==========================================
